disclaimer: This is a statistical project prediction, not a medical diagnosis.
project: High-Risk Pregnancy Prediction Using Maternal and Clinical Data
scientific_framing: Data1 and Data2 are separate training sources and are not row-merged. The combined probability is computed only at inference time when a user provides all required features for both models.
weight_rationale: Equal weights are used because Data1 and Data2 do not share pregnancy identifiers or a common validation cohort. Data1 performance is strong but scientifically suspicious, so it is not overweighted despite high holdout metrics.
